title: Shadow Stalkers
description:
a mod where you are hunted down by mysterious shadow people 
craft weapons armor and more to defeat the shadow fellas 
(this mod may not be the best quality so don't expect much)
body:
welcome to my mod!
in this _fantastic_ mod you are hunted by misterious shadow fellas
- **shadow stalker** a close range unit that dose minimal damage 
- **shadow ranger** a low hp unit that shoots shadow orbs woow that do to much dmg
- **shadow tank** a big fella that dose high dmg have high hp and when u hit them they get a speed bust
- **shadow summoner** a kinda big fella whit low hp that spawn shadow **_babyes_** 
- **shadow babyes** small vex like mobs that go trough walls and yea

when killing this shadow guys there is a chance that you will get shadow essense. whit 4 of them u craft raw shadow material once u smelt it u get shadow ingots that u can craft shadow armor yipii ;D

when u sit in light at night u the regen effect
and and when the shadow fellas get into the light they get slowness and weekness

u craft the shadow armor like normal armor 
exept expect the chest pice that u need **shadow spirit** u get it from killing **shadow tank** and **shadow summoner** ye so u just put the spirit in the middle and u get the chestplate
![shadow chest plate recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30d24840f05b84393a93c4e44558a746f703022f.png)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

_psst here the chest plate gives you stat bonusees when you are under shadow there needs to be 0 light tho_

</details>


the summoner cepter allaws you to spawn your own white guys that fight the evil dark guys...
wait WAIT N--
![summoner staff recipi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/755ff20e2da04d7a57d82946fd0df7feef25aef4.png)


anyhow...

around the world you will find **shadow transmiters**
![shadow transmiter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32f1090d7dcc07069cca4a70b3676c3ff3cfb4a5.png)
when you right click on this whit the shadow essense you will get telleported to the shadow realm 
rlly scarry dark place whit a lot of shadow fellas

there you will find a castle where you will need to fight the sadow king to get out of there 

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

right click whit the letters on the shadow transmiter to spawn the boss and or go home

</details>

and thats it ;) hope you will enjoy my mod spent 2 day on it still have plans to continue the mod but thats it for now b baii!!
